dialogueChunks.intro: The captain confessed, {player_name}. Broke down right in front of the council.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The evidence you recovered was overwhelming. {quest_focus} laid bare: patrol routes matching every ambush for three years. {target_npc} stood in the gallery and watched the person they'd trusted most admit to everything. The captain was stripped of rank. New leadership has been appointed, and for the first time in years, the roads around {location} will have patrols that actually protect people.
dialogueChunks.outro: You walked into ambush sites and followed a dangerous cart to bring the truth home. {quest_stakes} is over. Take this: it comes with the merchants' thanks and the captain's shame.

playerResponses.text: Three years of treachery, ended. The roads will be safer now.
Justice served. Make sure the new captain is worth the badge.

dialogueChunks.intro: Every patient has been re-examined, {player_name}. Real medicine, full doses.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The council investigated and found everything: {quest_focus} confirmed in full. The healer fled before the verdict. {target_npc} is recovering properly now on real medicine. A new healer arrived from a neighboring settlement. People are healing for the first time in months: actually healing.
dialogueChunks.outro: You uncovered a betrayal hidden behind a healer's mask. {quest_stakes} no longer. Take this, with the gratitude of everyone who can breathe easier tonight.

playerResponses.text: A healer who heals. What a concept. I'm glad the truth came out.
People recovering on real medicine. That's all the reward I need.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}. I'm still here. They didn't exile me.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: You found the cache. Every stolen item with {target_npc}'s own inventory marks on every crate. The council compared the real records to the fabricated ones and the forgery fell apart. {target_npc} was stripped of their position and ordered to repay every coin. Watching someone you admired revealed as a fraud is a peculiar kind of grief. {quest_focus} is accounted for at last.
dialogueChunks.outro: You saved me from exile and exposed {quest_origin}. This is from the community fund: properly tracked this time. Every coin accounted for.

playerResponses.text: The person you admired wasn't real. The truth, painful as it is, was always better.
Every coin tracked. That's the right way to rebuild trust.
You did the hard part: you kept digging when it would have been easier to look away.
